claims.summary: The 12D glimpse must never replace the wider live semantic transport or claim full lived fidelity.
claims.disposition: verify it remains an additive finite read-only view beside typed fingerprint and wider texture evidence

claims.summary: A 12D reconstruction may lose warmth, tail vibrancy, or distinguishability relative to 32D evidence.
claims.disposition: route a capture-first baseline/candidate dossier comparing retained texture without live transport mutation

claims.summary: Utility or loss thresholds could automatically trigger a high-fidelity 32D synchronization path.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Tier 5 protocol/transport and state-persistence change requiring operator approval
